PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. THAT PLAINTIFF, DELANE SIMS, RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT, AGUEDA SUNILDA GAVIRIA, THE SUM OF EIGHT THOUSAND ONE HUNDRED NINETY-TWO DOLLARS AND NINETY-SEVEN CENTS ($8,192.97). STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, DELANE SIMS. THAT PLAINTIFF JERRY SIMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT, AGUEDA SUNILDA GAVIRIA, THE SUM OF FIVE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($500.00). STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, JERRY SIMS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
